title: Dependency Dashboard
body:
This issue lists Renovate updates and detected dependencies. Read the [Dependency Dashboard](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/) docs to learn more.
[View this repository on the Mend.io Web Portal](https://developer.mend.io/github/containers/podman-py). ## Other Branches The following updates are pending. To force the creation of a PR, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] Update dependency python to 3.x - [ ] Update pre-commit hook astral-sh/ruff-pre-commit to v0.15.16 - [ ] Update pre-commit hook pre-commit/mirrors-mypy to v1.20.2 - [ ] Update pre-commit hook renovatebot/pre-commit-hooks to v43.218.0 - [ ] Update pre-commit hook teemtee/tmt to v1.75.0 - [ ] Update actions/checkout action to v6 - [ ] Update GitHub Artifact Actions (major) (`actions/download-artifact`, `actions/upload-artifact`) - [ ] Update pre-commit hook pre-commit/mirrors-mypy to v2 - [ ] Update pre-commit hook pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks to v6 ## Detected Dependencies
github-actions (8)
.github/actions/build-python-package/action.yml (3) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`] - `actions/setup-python v6` - `actions/upload-artifact v4` → [Updates: `v7`]
.github/workflows/build.yml (1) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`]
.github/workflows/create-github-release.yml (1) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`]
.github/workflows/create-release-pr.yml (2) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`] - `peter-evans/create-pull-request v8`
.github/workflows/pr.yml (3) - `tim-actions/get-pr-commits v1.3.1` - `tim-actions/commit-message-checker-with-regex v0.3.2` - `ubuntu 24.04`
.github/workflows/pre-commit.yml (4) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`] - `actions/setup-python v6` - `pre-commit/action v3.0.1` - `python 3.9 3.x ` → [Updates: `3.x`]
.github/workflows/publish-to-pypi.yml (3) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`] - `actions/download-artifact v5` → [Updates: `v8`] - `pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish release/v1`
.github/workflows/publish-to-test-pypi.yml (3) - `actions/checkout v5` → [Updates: `v6`] - `actions/download-artifact v5` → [Updates: `v8`] - `pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish release/v1`
poetry (1)
pyproject.toml (3) - `requests >=2.24` - `tomli >=1.2.3` - `rich >= 12.5.1`
pre-commit (1)
.pre-commit-config.yaml (5) - `pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks v5.0.0` → [Updates: `v6.0.0`] - `astral-sh/ruff-pre-commit v0.14.13` → [Updates: `v0.15.16`] - `teemtee/tmt 1.62.1` → [Updates: `1.75.0`] - `pre-commit/mirrors-mypy v1.19.1` → [Updates: `v1.20.2`, `v2.1.0`] - `renovatebot/pre-commit-hooks 43.3.5` → [Updates: `43.218.0`]
renovate-config (1)
.github/renovate.json5
setup-cfg (1)
setup.cfg (3) - `requests >=2.24` - `tomli >=1.2.3` - `rich >= 12.5.1`
--- - [ ] Check this box to trigger a request for Renovate to run again on this repository

comments.body: I think this is no longer an issue and renovate works as expected. @cevich can you please confirm and close if that is the case.

@umohnani8 I'm confused.  This issue is a hack, it's not a "real" issue.  Renovate updates it dynamically to reflect the current state of affairs for incoming update PRs on this repo.  If I close it, Renovate will re-open it w/in an hour.  Maybe that comment was intended for a different issue?

Oh okay, I didn't realise we need to keep this open for renovate to work. I thought it was opened to get the renovate work done initially.

Note: Keep this issue open for Renovate updates.
